message:
feat(test): property-based testing framework with 43 properties (bd-2tq.3)

Comprehensive proptest-driven test suite covering algebraic invariants
across five module families:

String properties (11 tests):
  strlen/NUL, strcmp reflexivity/antisymmetry, strncmp agreement,
  memcpy/memcmp round-trip, memmove overlap safety, memset prefix fill,
  memchr/memrchr correctness, strnlen bounds, strchr/strrchr agreement,
  strspn/strcspn coverage

Math properties (12 tests):
  Pythagorean identity, sin odd/cos even symmetry, exp/log round-trips,
  fabs non-negativity/symmetry, sqrt-of-square, copysign magnitude/sign,
  exp(0)=1, log(1)=0

Conversion properties (5 tests):
  strtol base-10/16/8 round-trips, atoi/strtol agreement,
  whitespace-insensitivity

ctype properties (10 tests):
  alnum=alpha|digit partition, alpha=upper|lower, xdigit⊇digit,
  tolower/toupper idempotency, space/graph exclusion, print=graph|space,
  digit ASCII range

inet properties (4 tests):
  inet_addr valid quad, inet_pton/ntop IPv4 round-trip,
  htonl/ntohl round-trip, htons/ntohs round-trip

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
